name: Advance America
description_short: Macclenny, FL's Advance America at 1350 S 6th St offers fast payday and title loans to local residents.
description_long:
Advance America in Macclenny, FL is located at 1350 S 6th St A4, a standalone storefront in the heart of Macclenny. The store operates Monday–Thursday 10 AM–6 PM, Friday–Saturday 9 AM–6 PM (Saturday closes at 4 PM), and is closed Sundays.

At this Macclenny location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other quick-cash services. Call +1 904-290-5779 to speak with staff about your options or to ask about processing times and requirements.

If you're in Macclenny and need emergency cash before payday, Advance America offers same-day lending for eligible borrowers. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information when you visit.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Higher loan amounts for title loans ($2,000–$25,000) compared to payday-only lenders
Multiple loan products (payday, installment, title) to match different borrower needs
4.9-star rating across 125,585+ Google reviews indicating consistent customer satisfaction
Bilingual support (Spanish) and trained staff to explain loan options
Flexible application: online, in-store, or phone pre-qualification
Extended store hours (open Saturday mornings; weekday hours until 6 p.m.)
cons: APR, fees, and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website—no transparency on actual cost
Payday and installment loans are high-cost products typically carrying triple-digit APRs
Short repayment terms (2–4 weeks for payday loans) increase default risk and debt cycle potential
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating risk of vehicle loss if borrower cannot repay
No mention of credit counseling, debt management, or alternatives to high-cost borrowing
best_for: Borrowers with immediate cash needs ($100–$1,000) and steady income for repayment within weeks
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency funds ($2,000–$25,000) and willing to use car as collateral
Consumers who prefer in-person interaction and explanation from trained loan officers before committing
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers facing genuine short-term cash emergencies who have income to repay within weeks and understand the high cost of borrowing. The critical caveat is that the company does not disclose APR or fees on its website; borrowers must contact the store or apply to learn actual costs, and typical rates far exceed alternatives like credit union PALs (capped at 36% APR) or employer advances.
services: Installment Loans ($100–$1,000, multiple payments over time)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 1350 S 6th St, Macclenny, FL. Fast payday and title loans with same-day funding.
